svg.title: CivDex future-vision public mockup
svg.desc: A public-safe animated future-vision mockup. Private data, credentials, addresses, customer details, and live operating strategy are omitted.

g.text: PUBLIC FUTURE MOCK / PRIVATE DETAILS OMITTED
Civic data starts with cited public sources.
The future view favors official pages, meeting records, notices, and clear freshness.
Source links, dates, and jurisdiction boundaries matter more than volume.
Entity resolution must be careful, not creepy.
The future product resolves offices, roles, districts, and routing without reckless exposure.
The line between navigation and targeting needs to stay visible.
The output should help ordinary people act.
Future CivDex turns public records into understandable paths, not raw dumps.
A useful civic layer should be source-backed, humble, and hard to abuse.
